title: onagra sinuata
intro: Onagra sinuata, also known as the slender evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onagra sinuata include relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing the severity of menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Onagra sinuata can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, and can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
